chapter_title.en: Chapter on Oaths, Vows, and Expiations

text: 4296 - وَ رُوِيَ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ : فِي رَجُلٍ قَالَ لاَ وَ أَبِي قَالَ "يَسْتَغْفِرُ اَللَّهَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4296 - It is narrated in another tradition about a man who said: "No, by my father."
Imam (as) said: "He should seek forgiveness from Allah (swt)."
